name: Lemon Roast Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken and pat it dry.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Stuff the cavity with half of the oregano and minced garlic.
4. Melt butter in a large frying pan.
5. Brown the chicken on all sides in the pan.
6. Transfer the chicken to a crock pot.
7. Sprinkle the remaining oregano and garlic over the chicken.
8. Add water from the frying pan, stirring to loosen the brown bits.
9. Pour the water into the crock pot.
10. Cover and cook on LOW for 8 hours.
11. In the last hour of cooking, add lemon juice.
12. Transfer the chicken to a cutting board and skim off any fat.
13. Pour the juices into a sauce bowl.
14. Carve the bird and serve with some juice spooned over the chicken.
